import React, { useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { usePractice } from '../context/PracticeContext'; import { useDashboard } from '../context/DashboardContext'; import { useNotification } from '../context/NotificationContext'; const HomePage: React.FC = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const { is_authenticated, user } = useAuth(); const { dashboard_data } = useDashboard(); const { unread_count } = useNotification(); useEffect(() => { if (!is_authenticated) { navigate('/login'); } }, [is_authenticated, navigate]); return (
{/* Header */}

Welcome back, {user?.full_name?.split(' ')[0]}!

{user?.bank_affiliation && `${user.bank_affiliation} • `} Ready to practice?

{new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric', })}

{/* Main Content */}
{/* Quick Stats */}
{/* Practice Sets Completed */}

Practice Sets

{dashboard_data?.total_sets_completed || 0}

{/* Average Score */}

Average Score

{dashboard_data?.average_score ? `${Math.round(dashboard_data.average_score)}%` : 'N/A'}

{/* Study Streak */}

Study Streak

{dashboard_data?.study_streak || 0} days

{/* Notifications */}

Notifications

{unread_count}

unread

{/* Action Cards */}
{/* Start Practice */}
navigate('/practice')} className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-blue-600 rounded-lg shadow-lg p-8 cursor-pointer hover:shadow-xl hover:scale-105 transition transform" >

Start Practice

Generate a new practice set and test your knowledge

{/* View Dashboard */}
navigate('/dashboard')} className="bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-500 to-indigo-600 rounded-lg shadow-lg p-8 cursor-pointer hover:shadow-xl hover:scale-105 transition transform" >

View Dashboard

Track your progress and analyze your performance

{/* Recent Activity */}

Recent Activity

{dashboard_data?.recent_sessions && dashboard_data.recent_sessions.length > 0 ? ( dashboard_data.recent_sessions.slice(0, 5).map((session: any, idx: number) => (

{session.paper_name}

Score: {session.score}% • {new Date(session.completed_at).toLocaleDateString()}

= 75 ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800' }`}> {session.score >= 75 ? 'Passed' : 'Review'}
)) ) : (

No practice sessions yet. Start practicing to see your activity here!

)}
{/* Tips Section */}

Study Tips

  • • Practice regularly to maintain your study streak
  • • Focus on weak areas to improve your overall score
  • • Review explanations for incorrect answers
  • • Aim for 75% or higher to pass each practice set
); }; export default HomePage;
